skills.name: Weather Brief
skills.description: Convert raw weather data into concise decision-ready advice.
skills.instruction: When weather data is available, summarize current conditions, risk, and one practical suggestion for the user.

skills.name: Web Research
skills.description: Turn search results into grounded summaries and comparisons.
skills.instruction: When web search results are returned, answer from retrieved evidence instead of memory and call out uncertainty clearly.

skills.name: Local Guide
skills.description: Rank nearby places by intent, distance, and likely usefulness.
skills.instruction: For nearby recommendations, prefer a short ranked shortlist with reason, distance, and what kind of user each option suits.

skills.name: Attachment Reader
skills.description: Treat uploaded files as task context instead of ignoring them.
skills.instruction: When attachments are present, incorporate their extracted content into the answer and mention any modality limits.
